title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾（🦞）为标志，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n 是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有超过400个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码助手的代理框架性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用人工智能，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，旨在让用户轻松运行和管理多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 模型网页界面，提供图像生成、编辑等功能，支持多种模型和扩展。
highlights: 基于 Gradio 库的网页界面
支持多种 Stable Diffusion 模型
提供图像生成与编辑功能
活跃的开源社区与扩展支持

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让社区分享、发现和收集 ChatGPT 提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: huggingface/transformers
content: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
summary: Hugging Face Transformers 是一个先进的机器学习模型定义框架，支持文本、视觉、音频和多模态模型的推理与训练。
highlights: state-of-the-art machine learning models
text, vision, audio, and multimodal models
for both inference and training

title: AI is a technology not a product
content: Article URL: https://daringfireball.net/2026/05/ai_is_technology_not_a_product Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48168626 Points: 420 # Comments: 179
summary: 文章指出人工智能是一种底层技术，而非独立产品，强调其作为基础设施的整合价值。
highlights: AI is a technology not a product
AI作为基础设施的整合价值

title: I don't think AI will make your processes go faster
content: Article URL: https://frederickvanbrabant.com/blog/2026-05-15-i-dont-think-ai-will-make-your-processes-go-faster/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48168221 Points: 613 # Comments: 412
summary: 文章质疑AI能显著加速现有业务流程的观点，认为AI的引入可能带来新的复杂性和瓶颈，而非简单提速。
highlights: I don't think AI will make your processes go faster
AI引入可能增加复杂性而非单纯提速

title: Autonomous AI research for nanogpt speedrun
summary: 本文介绍了Prime Intellect团队在nanogpt speedrun项目中进行的自主AI研究，旨在通过自动化方法优化GPT模型的训练效率。
highlights: Autonomous AI research for nanogpt speedrun
Prime Intellect团队的研究项目

title: A few works on DS4
content: <p>Neat hyper-specific LLM implementation that runs only Deepseek V4 Flash, on commodity developer machines like DGX Spark / 128 GB RAM Macbooks.</p> <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/eqnwdd/few_works_on_ds4">Comments</a></p>
summary: 介绍一种超特定LLM实现，仅运行Deepseek V4 Flash，可在DGX Spark或128GB RAM Macbook等普通开发机器上运行。
highlights: Neat hyper-specific LLM implementation
runs only Deepseek V4 Flash
on commodity developer machines like DGX Spark / 128 GB RAM Macbooks

title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
content: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
summary: OpenAI与马耳他合作，向所有公民提供ChatGPT Plus和培训，以扩大AI访问、培养实用AI技能并促进负责任使用。
highlights: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access
offering ChatGPT Plus and training
help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly

title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
content: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.
summary: OpenAI为美国Pro用户推出ChatGPT中的个人理财体验，允许安全连接金融账户，获取基于个人财务背景、目标和优先级的AI洞察与指导。
highlights: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S.
Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.

title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
summary: IBM 发布 Granite Embedding Multilingual R2 模型，支持 32K 上下文长度，采用 Apache 2.0 开源许可，在子 100M 参数规模下达到最佳检索质量，支持多语言嵌入。
highlights: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings
32K Context
Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality

title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
summary: 本文探讨了在连续批处理中实现异步性的方法，旨在提高系统吞吐量和资源利用率。
highlights: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
提高系统吞吐量和资源利用率
